subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the friends of the Abhá Beauty—may my spirit be a sacrifice unto them! In truth, the kings are but bondmen and in need [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم دوستان جمال ابهی روحی لهم الفداء ملوک فی الحقیقه عبد مملوکند و محتاج
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
